attributes.name: Remaining half cost deadline
attributes.description: This one should be said in words: "One week after we notify the client that we have submitted the work, that we're ready to go ahead and we're done with our part."

nodes.name: Update row with latest call ID

parameters.content:
# 🎯 FATHOM.AI SALES PROPOSAL AUTOMATION

**Purpose:** Automatically generate and send sales proposals after Fathom.ai sales calls

**How It Works:**
1. Fathom webhook triggers when call recording completes
2. Lookup lead in Google Sheets CRM
3. Route based on call type (Sales vs Closing)
4. Extract proposal data from transcript using AI
5. Generate personalized proposal document
6. Send proposal via Gmail for review
7. Update CRM with tracking IDs

**Prerequisites:**
✅ Fathom.ai account with webhook configured
✅ Google Sheets CRM with lead data
✅ OpenRouter API credentials for AI extraction
✅ Gmail account for sending proposals
✅ Google Drive template document

**Execution:** Runs automatically when Fathom webhook fires

## 📥 WEBHOOK TRIGGER

**Function:** Receives Fathom.ai call data

**Includes:**
- Meeting title & date
- Full transcript
- Summary & action items
- Attendee list
- Recording URLs

**Note:** Webhook secret is pre-configured

## 🔍 CRM LOOKUP

**Function:** Find lead record in Google Sheets

**Lookup Key:** Contact email from calendar invitees

**Returns:** Full lead profile including:
- Company name
- Contact details
- Previous call IDs
- Deal status

## 🧹 DATA TRANSFORMATION

**Function:** Clean and format Fathom data for AI processing

**Operations:**
1. Extract meeting metadata
2. Remove markdown URLs from summary
3. Group transcript by speaker
4. Format attendee list
5. Structure data for downstream nodes

**Output:** Clean JSON with:
- meeting_title, date, attendees
- recording_url, playback_url
- summary, transcript, action_items

## 🤖 AI EXTRACTION ENGINE

**Function:** Extract structured proposal data from call transcript

**AI Model:** OpenRouter (configurable)

**Extracts 18+ Fields:**
- Proposal title & description
- Client bottlenecks (≤120 words)
- Project aim & goal
- 3 solution headings + descriptions
- 4 project phases with descriptions
- Pricing: First half cost + deadline
- Pricing: Remaining half cost + deadline

**Input:** Company name + full transcript
**Output:** Structured JSON for template replacement

**Note:** AI consolidates 4-5 solutions into 3 if needed

## 📄 DOCUMENT GENERATION

**Path:** Sales Call Route (True branch)

**Steps:**
1. Copy template from Google Drive
2. Replace placeholders with AI-extracted data
3. Generate personalized proposal document
